title: Garlicky Creamy Vietnamese Pork Pho
description: A keto-friendly, comforting Vietnamese dish featuring caramelized sugar sauce and tender pork, served with a rich and creamy broth.
instructions: Caramelize the sugar sauce in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
In a separate pan, toast the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the garlic and ginger to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the pork to the pan and cook until browned.
Add the fish sauce and soy sauce to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the caramel sauce to the pan and simmer for 5 minutes.
In a blender or food processor, combine the heavy cream and chicken broth and blend until smooth.
Pour the blended mixture into the pan with the pork and cook for 5 minutes.
Season the broth with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the broth over noodles with the pork and garnish with cilantro.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
